column1: UK-AQ v2 integrity: recommended verification and repair order

column4: Upstream source data + v2 core mappings, compared with v2 observation parquet
column8: Healthy observation data is not rewritten.

column3: Observation parquet is missing, invalid, or incomplete and authoritative source data is available
column4: Upstream source data + v2 core mappings
column5: Run one scoped v2 observation backfill for the affected connector/day/timeseries set
column6: Re-read the final v2 observation parquet and compare it with the source
column8: Observation data is repaired first, so metadata is built only once from the final parquet.

column3: Source data or mapping is unavailable or unsafe
column4: Source adapter evidence + v2 core mapping tables
column5: Do not repair this scope; report operator action
column7: Stop this scope; continue unrelated scopes
column8: Prevents manifests or AQI being built from uncertain observation data.

column3: Observation parquet is verified and manifests are healthy
column4: Final verified observation parquet + existing live child manifests
column5: Do not rebuild manifests; verify indexes
column6: Validate manifest hierarchy before using it as the index source
column7: Index verification within the same metadata task
column8: Manifests and indexes are one high-level task, but manifests always come first.

column3: Pollutant, connector, or day manifest is missing, stale, or incomplete
column4: Final verified observation parquet + all valid sibling manifests in R2
column5: Rebuild manifests bottom-up: pollutant → connector → day
column6: Freshly read and validate every changed manifest
column8: Parents are produced once after all observation and child-manifest work is complete.

column3: Manifest hierarchy is valid but index/latest/metadata is missing or stale
column4: Final verified day manifests and current index objects
column5: Rebuild only the affected observation index/latest/metadata objects
column6: Freshly read and validate every changed index object
column8: Indexes are built once from the final manifest hierarchy.

column4: Live R2 child set and exact child hashes
column5: Block index repair and block aqilevel repair for this scope
column6: Record exact failed object or dependency
column7: Stop this scope; continue unrelated scopes
column8: Prevents indexes and AQI work being based on unverified observation metadata.

column3: All expected AQI UTC hours already exist for eligible pollutants
column4: Final verified v2 observation parquet, v2 core pollutant mapping, and v2 aqilevel parquet/manifests
column8: AQI is checked only after observation data and metadata have reached their final state.

column3: Expected AQI UTC hours are missing or AQI output/metadata is invalid
column4: Final verified observations grouped by timeseries and UTC hour
column5: Run one scoped v2 aqilevel rebuild for the affected connector/day
column6: Re-read AQI parquet/manifests and verify the expected UTC-hour identities
column8: One AQI rebuild covers all affected eligible hours after observation repairs are complete.

column3: Pollutant is not AQI eligible, such as O3
column8: Unsupported pollutants never enter the AQI repair workflow.

column3: Observs or metadata are not verified
column5: Block aqilevel repair for that scope
column7: Stop this scope; continue unrelated scopes
column8: Avoids rebuilding AQI from incomplete observations or broken manifests.

column4: Run integrity again against observs, manifests, indexes, and aqilevels
column5: No further repair in the same run
column6: Confirm all four areas are healthy
column8: One final pass proves the complete ordered result without creating a repair loop.

column3: Any issue remains after the final pass
column5: Report the remaining scope and fail the run
column7: Investigate or retry in a later run
column8: Prevents repeated writes when the real cause has not been resolved.
